items.headline_ai: Trinity Capital posts record Q1 2026 NII $44.5M, $0.53 per share, up 37%
items.snippet: Trinity Capital reported record Q1 2026 net investment income of $44.5M ($0.53/share), up 37.4% year-over-year, with NAV at $13.27/share.

items.snippet: Trinity Capital funded $306M in investments and originated $395M of new commitments in Q1 2026, ahead of its May 6 earnings release.
